allow: Bash(# Kill the running app first pkill -f ""DrawThingsStudio"" || true # Clean the build /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr/bin/xcodebuild -project /Users/skeptict/Documents/GitHub/DrawThingsStudio/DrawThingsStudio.xcodeproj -scheme DrawThingsStudio clean 2>&1)

Bash(# Kill any running instance pkill -f ""DrawThingsStudio"" || true # Rebuild /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr/bin/xcodebuild -project /Users/skeptict/Documents/GitHub/DrawThingsStudio/DrawThingsStudio.xcodeproj -scheme DrawThingsStudio -destination ''platform=macOS'' build 2>&1)

Bash(# Kill any running instance pkill -f ""DrawThingsStudio"" || true # Clean and rebuild /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr/bin/xcodebuild -project /Users/skeptict/Documents/GitHub/DrawThingsStudio/DrawThingsStudio.xcodeproj -scheme DrawThingsStudio clean 2>&1)

Bash(git -C /Users/skeptict/Documents/GitHub/DrawThingsStudio commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add manual entry for models/LoRAs and improve gRPC debug logging

- Add ModelSelectorView with toggle between dropdown and manual text entry
- User can now manually enter model filenames when gRPC model list unavailable
- LoRAConfigurationView already supports manual LoRA entry \(from previous work\)
- Improve gRPC model/LoRA fetching with multiple extraction strategies:
  - Check files array in EchoReply first
  - Parse FlatBuffer binary data from MetadataOverride as fallback
  - Try multiple string extraction methods \(length-prefixed, null-terminated, regex\)
- Add debug logging to /tmp/dts_grpc_debug.log for troubleshooting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/skeptict/Documents/GitHub/DrawThingsStudio commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: add accessibility identifiers for UI testing

Add accessibilityIdentifier modifiers to all interactive UI elements
to enable XCUITest automation:

- Sidebar navigation buttons \(sidebar_workflow, sidebar_generateImage, etc.\)
- Generate Image: prompt fields, generate/cancel buttons, refresh button
- Image Inspector: copy buttons, send to generate button, clear history
- Model selector: toggle manual entry, refresh, manual entry field
- LoRA configuration: add button, manual entry field
- Settings: Draw Things host/port fields, transport picker, test connection
- Saved Workflows: search field, save button
- Templates: search field, use template button

Also adds UI Testing target \(DrawThingsStudioUITests\) created via Xcode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(# First, let''s try to get model info from Draw Things via curl curl -s http://127.0.0.1:7860/info)

Bash(# Try to enter text using AppleScript - simpler approach osascript -e '' tell application ""System Events"" tell process ""DrawThingsStudio"" set frontmost to true delay 0.5 -- Tab through fields: should land on prompt first keystroke tab delay 0.3 keystroke ""a beautiful sunset over mountains"" delay 0.3 -- Tab to negative prompt, then to model field keystroke tab delay 0.2 keystroke tab delay 0.2 keystroke ""flux1-schnell-q8p.ckpt"" delay 0.3 -- Cmd+Return to generate keystroke return using command down end tell end tell '' echo ""Generation triggered. Waiting for completion..."" sleep 20 # Check if directory was created echo """" echo ""=== Checking storage directory ==="" ls -la ~/Library/Application\\ Support/DrawThingsStudio/ || echo ""Directory still does not exist"" ls -la ~/Library/Application\\ Support/DrawThingsStudio/GeneratedImages/ || echo ""GeneratedImages directory does not exist"" # Check system log for our NSLog messages echo """" echo ""=== System log messages ==="" log show --last 1m --predicate ''eventMessage CONTAINS ""[ImageStorage]""'' --style compact)

Bash(# Kill existing and relaunch with console output captured pkill -9 DrawThingsStudio || true sleep 1 # Run app from command line to capture stdout/stderr ""/Users/skeptict/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/DrawThingsStudio-grhnabmjcwpuqwadjytwgmxrstqt/Build/Products/Debug/DrawThingsStudio.app/Contents/MacOS/DrawThingsStudio"" 2>&1 & APP_PID=$! echo ""App PID: $APP_PID"" sleep 3 # Navigate and try to generate osascript -e '' tell application ""System Events"" tell process ""DrawThingsStudio"" set frontmost to true delay 1 keystroke ""1"" using command down delay 1 end tell end tell '' sleep 2 # Check the UI accessibility hierarchy to understand field structure osascript -e '' tell application ""System Events"" tell process ""DrawThingsStudio"" return description of every UI element of window 1 end tell end tell '' 2>&1)

Bash(# Check the sandboxed location echo ""=== Sandboxed storage location ==="" ls -la ~/Library/Containers/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio/Data/Library/Application\\ Support/DrawThingsStudio/GeneratedImages/ || echo ""Directory doesn''t exist"" # Also check if any images are there echo """" echo ""=== Image files ==="" find ~/Library/Containers/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio/Data/Library/Application\\ Support/DrawThingsStudio -name ""*.png"")

Bash(# Kill the running app first pkill -9 DrawThingsStudio || true sleep 1 # Run UI tests xcodebuild test \\ -project DrawThingsStudio.xcodeproj \\ -scheme DrawThingsStudio \\ -destination ''platform=macOS'' \\ -only-testing:DrawThingsStudioUITests \\ 2>&1)

Bash(# Make sure app is fully terminated pkill -9 DrawThingsStudio || true pkill -9 DrawThingsStudioUITests || true sleep 3 # Try running tests again xcodebuild test \\ -project DrawThingsStudio.xcodeproj \\ -scheme DrawThingsStudio \\ -destination ''platform=macOS'' \\ -only-testing:DrawThingsStudioUITests \\ 2>&1)

Bash(# Wait for tests to complete and check final output sleep 30 tail -20 /private/tmp/claude/-Users-skeptict-Documents-GitHub-DrawThingsStudio/tasks/b6311ef.output # Also check if xcodebuild is still running ps aux)
Bash(# Check if settings are reset to defaults after UI tests defaults read tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio)
Bash(# Check sandboxed defaults defaults read ~/Library/Containers/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio/Data/Library/Preferences/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio.plist)

Bash(# Launch app and check if connection works pkill -9 DrawThingsStudio || true sleep 1 ""/Users/skeptict/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/DrawThingsStudio-grhnabmjcwpuqwadjytwgmxrstqt/Build/Products/Debug/DrawThingsStudio.app/Contents/MacOS/DrawThingsStudio"" 2>&1 & sleep 4 # Check if gRPC connection works by looking at logs grep -E ""\(gRPC|connection|Connected\)"" /tmp/app_check.log)

Bash(# Kill any existing instance pkill -9 DrawThingsStudio || true sleep 1 # Run app from command line to capture stdout ""/Users/skeptict/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/DrawThingsStudio-grhnabmjcwpuqwadjytwgmxrstqt/Build/Products/Debug/DrawThingsStudio.app/Contents/MacOS/DrawThingsStudio"" 2>&1 & sleep 5 # Check the logs for cloud catalog messages grep -i ""cloud"" /tmp/cloud_test.log || echo ""No cloud logs yet"" # Also check UserDefaults for cached models defaults read tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio cloudModelCatalog)

Bash(# Wait a bit more for network fetch sleep 10 # Check sandboxed UserDefaults for the cloud model cache defaults read ~/Library/Containers/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio/Data/Library/Preferences/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio.plist)

Bash(# Relaunch with console output pkill -9 DrawThingsStudio || true sleep 1 ""/Users/skeptict/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/DrawThingsStudio-grhnabmjcwpuqwadjytwgmxrstqt/Build/Products/Debug/DrawThingsStudio.app/Contents/MacOS/DrawThingsStudio"" 2>&1 & sleep 3 # Navigate to Generate Image view using keyboard shortcut osascript -e '' tell application ""System Events"" tell process ""DrawThingsStudio"" set frontmost to true delay 0.5 -- Click on Generate Image in sidebar keystroke ""2"" using command down end tell end tell '' echo ""Navigated to Generate Image. Waiting for cloud fetch..."" sleep 8 # Check system log for cloud-catalog messages log show --last 30s --predicate ''subsystem == ""com.drawthingsstudio""'' --style compact)

Bash(# Check if cloud models were cached # The app is sandboxed, so check the container UserDefaults cat ~/Library/Containers/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio/Data/Library/Preferences/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio.plist)

Bash(# List the preferences directory ls -la ~/Library/Containers/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio/Data/Library/Preferences/ # Check if plist exists file ~/Library/Containers/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio/Data/Library/Preferences/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio.plist || echo ""Plist doesn''t exist"" # Let''s run the app again and check network activity pkill -9 DrawThingsStudio || true sleep 1 # Run with network debug ""/Users/skeptict/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/DrawThingsStudio-grhnabmjcwpuqwadjytwgmxrstqt/Build/Products/Debug/DrawThingsStudio.app/Contents/MacOS/DrawThingsStudio"" 2>&1)

Bash(# Convert plist to XML and search for cloud model data plutil -convert xml1 -o /tmp/dts_prefs.xml ~/Library/Containers/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio/Data/Library/Preferences/tanque.org.DrawThingsStudio.plist cat /tmp/dts_prefs.xml)
